mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_document ( doc_id, original_filename, file_path, content_type, file_size, upload_time, parse_status, parse_time, chunk_count, metadata, error_message ) VALUES ( #{docId}, #{originalFilename}, #{filePath}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadTime}, #{parseStatus}, #{parseTime}, #{chunkCount}, #{metadata}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.select: SELECT doc_id, original_filename, file_path, content_type, file_size, upload_time, parse_status, parse_time, chunk_count, metadata, error_message FROM rag_document WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
